nodes.label:
Plot all Constraints & Non-Negativity
on Graph

Find Coordinates of
all Corner Points

Evaluate Objective Function
at each Corner Point

svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Graphical Method</text>
  
  <!-- Axes -->
  <line x1="50" y1="250" x2="350" y2="250" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="50" y1="250" x2="50" y2="80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="45" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Y
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="355" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    X
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Constraint 1: x + y ≤ 8 -->
  <line x1="50" y1="250" x2="210" y2="90" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="220" y="85" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    x + y ≤ 8
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Constraint 2: 2x + y ≤ 10 -->
  <line x1="50" y1="150" x2="300" y2="250" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="310" y="245" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    2x + y ≤ 10
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Feasible Region -->
  <polygon points="50,250 50,150 100,150 210,90" fill="#64B5F6" fill-opacity="0.5" stroke="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  <text x="120" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Feasible Region
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Objective Function: Maximize 3x + 2y -->
  <line x1="70" y1="214" x2="290" y2="130" stroke="#FF5252" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="300" y="125" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#FF5252" opacity="0">
    Maximize 3x + 2y
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Optimal Solution Point -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="150" r="5" fill="#FF5252" stroke="#FFFFFF" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="115" cy="145" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#FF5252" opacity="0">
    Optimal Solution (2,6)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
